summary: Inventory shard classified independently with no shared canonical. No close, merge, fix, or PR-opening actions are allowed by the job/fix artifact; useful open PRs are kept open with exact blockers noted. The only security-sensitive hydrated linked ref is routed to central security handling without affecting unrelated PR classifications.
